thinking:
**Consolidating Dynamic Display**

I'm aiming to minimize file writes. My plan involves a single `multi_replace_file_content` call for non-contiguous edits in `DynamicDisplayComponent.h`. I've begun reviewing the chunks for that function to make sure everything's in order, starting with the constructor.


**Adding Matrix Mixer XL Support**

\n\n

I've incorporated the Matrix Mixer XL cell value editor into `DynamicDisplayComponent.h`. My focus is now on integrating the editor, which will be visible only in the Matrix Mixer XL display. I've defined its layout, including size and color. I'm also ensuring the editor updates values correctly. The resized method has been adjusted to handle its positioning within the display.


**Refining Matrix XL Interaction**

I've just added cell selection, implementing click-to-select functionality that updates the interface, including a new "CELL (X,Y):" label in the toolbar. Highlighting for the selected cell is now distinct from the hover effect. Also, I've incorporated a bottom label explaining interaction methods. Additionally, I am currently modifying the `mouseDownMatrixMixerXL()` method to account for these changes.


**Refining Gain Adjustment**

I'm now implementing gain modification within the Matrix Mixer XL. I've updated the `mouseDownMatrixMixerXL` method. Single clicks select cells and focus the editor for text input, while right clicks or double clicks toggle the cell value between 0 and 1. I'm also implementing a helper method for updating the selected cell from the editor value and state variables.

args.Description: "Implemented selected cell visual markers (glowing pink border), interactive cell text editor in top toolbar showing coordinates, instant keyboard focus grab and text auto-select when clicking any grid cell to support instant typing, and hid the redundant LUA SCRIPT EDITOR button on the Matrix Mixer XL view."
args.Instruction: "Implement cell selection borders, keyboard-focusable cell value text editor, and hide redundant script toggle button in DynamicDisplayComponent.h"
args.toolAction: "Implementing selected cell text editor UI and hiding redundant mode button in DynamicDisplayComponent.h"
